subcodes.title: Words spoken in Sep. 1911 in London
subcodes.first_line: The teachings are the same. It is the same foundation and the same temple. Truth is one, and without division.
subcodes.subjects: @Christ; Christianity, @oneness; unity of religion, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @work as worship, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @monasticism; asceticism, @useful occupation; acquisition of a craft; trade; profession
